coding_standards: TypeScript + React 18 function components with hooks ONLY — no class components, and NO PropTypes (type props with TS interfaces/types). Use the React 17+ automatic JSX transform (do not add `import React` just for JSX). Style with CSS Modules (*.module.css); no inline style objects for layout. Use framer-motion for animation. Persist game state to localStorage. Prefer named exports and small, single-responsibility components. Avoid `any` — type all props, state, hooks, and function signatures. Colocate a *.test.tsx beside each component using Jest + React Testing Library: render/screen, @testing-library/user-event for interactions, jest-dom matchers; assert observable behavior, not implementation details. Match the repo's .prettierrc and ESLint (.eslintrc.cjs) rules exactly.
